---
title: "Laura Belinda Charlotte Valentine"
---

## Laura Belinda Charlotte Valentine

**Dates:** (1816?-1899)

**Maiden name:** (Jewry)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>, publishers’ editor

### Biography

She was born at Portsea, Hants., and gave different ages in several census returns. A governess in 1841;  she married (1853) the Rev. Richard John Scobell Valentine (d.1853/4), curate in charge of St. Mary, Portsea.  The birth to her of a posthumous stillborn son was reported in the <i>Morning Chronicle</i> (1 July 1854).  By 1861 she was living with her mother (widow of a lieutenant RN) at the Naval Asylum, Battersea, with her unmarried sister Mary Jewry. She worked for Warne as a children’s books editor.

### Letters

- Letter from May 19th [1871]
- Letter from Oct 26th 1868
- Letter from Oct 10th 1868
- Letter from Sept 15th [1868]
- Letter from July 18th [1868?]
- Letter from Novr 20th [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
